topics_covered: Organizational Details for the Practical Course (PGDP, IN0002)

topics_with_questions: Organizational Details for the Practical Course (PGDP, IN0002)

gaps.recommendation: Add a basic question about who the instructors are.
Add a question about the semester length and break.
Add a question about the structure of central exercises.
Add a question about the teaching method (mixture of lecture and self-work).
Add a question about the special schedule in week 1.
Add a question about homework publication and deadlines.
Add a question about the two correction modes.
Add a question about matching deadlines and process.
Add a question about special groups.
Add a question about the main communication platform.
Add a question about the five tools used.
Add a question about first-week action items.

quality_issues.issue: Quiz lacks questions on many important administrative and organizational details from the practical course section.
quality_issues.suggestion: Add questions covering missing concepts such as teaching team, schedule, Zentralübung format, homework deadlines, correction modes, matching deadlines, communication channels, and first-week tasks.

overall_assessment.summary: The notes comprehensively cover all outline concepts (100%). However, the quiz only covers 55.6% of the concepts, missing many critical organizational details from the practical course. While students can learn from the notes, they cannot effectively self-assess their understanding of several key administrative procedures. The quiz needs significant expansion to achieve comprehensive coverage.
